name: Chicken Breasts with Soya-Honey Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the chicken pieces.
2. In a bowl, combine minced green onions, pressed garlic, liquid honey, dry sherry, grated fresh ginger, and soya sauce.
3. Dip the chicken breasts in the sauce.
4. Place the chicken breasts in a plastic bag and pour in the remaining sauce. Seal the bag tightly.
5. Let the chicken stand at room temperature for 30 to 60 minutes.
6. Prepare the barbecue with the grill set four inches (10 cm) above hot coals.
7. Drain the chicken breasts and grill, turning as needed to prevent charring and allow even cooking for about 25 minutes.
8. Brush the chicken with sauce as required to keep the meat moist.
9. Heat the remaining sauce and serve with the grilled chicken. Serves four.
